title: Quality pass: clippy pedantic cleanup in crossbridge-client
description:
Current state: 

Desired state: 

Reason: 

Run `cargo clippy -p crossbridge-client --all-targets -- -W clippy::pedantic` and resolve every warning (currently 13). Top categories: cast_possible_truncation, unnecessary_wraps (`jj_origin_url` returns `Result<Option<String>>` but never `Err`s — collapse to `Option<String>`), needless_pass_by_value, missing_errors_doc, map_unwrap_or.

Acceptance criteria:
- `cargo clippy -p crossbridge-client --all-targets -- -W clippy::pedantic -D warnings` exits 0.
- No blanket `#[allow(clippy::pedantic)]` or `#[allow(...)]` over whole modules — fix the underlying issues, only allow specific lints with a one-line justification comment when the pedantic suggestion is genuinely worse.
- All existing tests still pass (`cargo test -p crossbridge-client`), including the `end_to_end` integration test.
- `cargo fmt --check` clean.
